channel.title: Bioinformatics on Jinsong Zhang
channel.description: Recent content in Bioinformatics on Jinsong Zhang

item.title: Exploring leukemia prognosis using Shiny
item.description: The acute myeloid leukemia (AML) is one the most devastating form of cancer. AML prognosis is influenced by many factors. The goal of this shiny application is to explore the relationship between AML prognosis and gene expression.
